## Testing

<!-- List the commands run locally. -->
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] `pytest tests/ --cov=bioneuronai`
- [ ] `black .`
- [ ] `isort .`
- [ ] `mypy src`
- [ ] `sphinx-build -b html docs docs/_build/html`
- [ ] `python smart_assistant.py --non-interactive --output smart_report.json`

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs/architecture.md, or docstrings as needed)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Linked to relevant issues or discussions
- [ ] Smart Learning Assistant report reviewed (attach if insights are notable)
